articles.title: Hopkinton police seeking information after ‘suspicious video’ of person walking into roadway at night circulates online
articles.description:
"Driving home on this road off 85 in Hopkinton around 11:30 last night and this dude in a construction vest and hard hat holding a shovel is just walking onto the road in front of me. He also had some Halloween mask on," a Reddit post said.

The post Hopkinton police seeking information after ‘suspicious video’ of person walking into roadway at night circulates online appeared first on Boston.com.

articles.title: Boston City Council approves $1.7 billion schools budget that cuts hundreds of jobs
articles.description:

articles.description:
